steps.description: Click the “Source Control” icon (third item with the branch symbol and "M3" badge) in the left sidebar of the Visual Studio Code interface to open the Source Control view.
Click the "Close" (X) button on the "Walkthrough: Setup VS Code" tab in the Visual Studio Code application interface.

Click the "Build a Declarative Agent" button in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit welcome panel within Visual Studio Code. The button is highlighted in blue on the left sidebar, directly under the "Get started with a guided tutorial" text.
Click the "Create a New Agent App" button in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit sidebar of Visual Studio Code.
